title: Incredibly Crisp Croatian Lamb Kebabs
description: Buttery and crisp Croatian lamb kebabs featuring ghee and grilled to perfection, this dish is perfect for adventurous eaters, and is low-glycemic-friendly. The combination of lamb, ghee, and spices creates a unique flavor profile that is both savory and aromatic.
instructions: Preheat the grill to medium-high heat, about 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large bowl, whisk together ghee, garlic, paprika, salt, black pepper, and oregano.
Add the lamb cubes to the bowl and toss to coat evenly with the ghee mixture.
Thread the lamb cubes onto skewers, leaving a small space between each piece.
Brush the grill with oil to prevent sticking, then grill the kebabs for 10-12 minutes, turning occasionally.
After 10 minutes, brush the kebabs with lemon juice and continue grilling for an additional 2 minutes.
Remove the kebabs from the grill and let rest for 5 minutes before serving.
Serve the kebabs hot, garnished with fresh parsley or oregano if desired.
